description: Style Note provogue lets you know style with this gallantly gorgeous black leather belt. It gives you that new and distinct look that the world is searching for. The brand brings a sense of fashion that is easily comprehended by the pure unique appearance of this belt. Wear it with a pair of dark blue jeans and let the planet stare. Product Details Black leather belt for men Has a metal buckle Material and Care Leather Use polisher to maintain buckle shine Wipe surface with a clean dry cloth to remove dust 101246 Style Note Provogue lets you feel alive with this exquisite black leather belt. It will give you a slick and chic look with it's continental touch that allows you to wear it with a pair of semi-formal light coloured trouser on a sandy beach. After all, it feels good to look good.
